sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Aristophanes Byzantinus</hi> Philosophus [Ar.Byz.] <date TEIform="date">iii/ii B.C.</date> <title_ TEIform="title">Epit. = Historiae Animalium Epitome subiunctis Aeliani Timothei aliorumque eclogis,</title_> ed. Spyridon P. Lambros (<title_ TEIform="title">Supplementum Aristotelicum</title_> i <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> i), Berlin 1885.</item>
